description_long: This is a tall, freestanding metal storage cabinet with a matte black finish, commonly found in garages, workshops, or utility rooms in urban environments. The front features two vertically aligned doors with prominent silver handles and a horizontal silver accent at the top, giving it a modern industrial look. The doors have subtle horizontal vent-like indents, suggesting ventilation or a reinforced structure. The sides and back are plain, flat panels with no visible openings or features, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The cabinet stands on short legs, slightly elevating it off the ground, which helps prevent moisture damage when placed on concrete or outdoor surfaces. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or supplies securely.
description: A tall, matte black metal storage cabinet with double doors, silver handles, and a modern industrial design. Ideal for garages or utility spaces, it features vented doors and a sturdy, elevated base.
description_view_0: Side view showing a flat, featureless black panel with a slight protrusion where the handles are attached on the front.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two black doors with silver handles, a silver accent at the top, and horizontal vent-like indents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a flat, unadorned black panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no openings or features.
